name: x-search
tagline: ClawHub (139★): Search X (Twitter) posts using the xAI API. Use when the user wants to find tweets, search X/Twitter, look up what people a
verdict: If the API key is missing, invalid, or the search just returns nothing, the skill has no instructions for any of it — pure happy-path, so failures go silent instead of being surfaced. No version tracking and no stated boundaries on when not to use it either.

highlights.summary: No mention anywhere of what to do if XAI_API_KEY is unset/invalid, the API call fails, or the search returns no results — silent happy-path throughout Setup and Usage.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body; skill has enough surface (multiple flags, general search framing) that misfire agains
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
